programme.desc: In the latest episode of Premier League Legends, we look at the career of Manchester United full back, Gary Neville, who won eight Premier League titles.

programme.desc: This episode reflects on the Premier League career of former Liverpool forward Robbie Fowler, who is regarded by many as the best finisher to play in the English top flight.

programme.desc: A documentary that traces the rise of Carlos Alcaraz and Jannik Sinner, revealing how the two young stars are redefining the sport for a new generation.

programme.title: Courtside - Live
programme.desc: F. Cobolli vs. F. Auger-Aliassime OR A. Rublev; N. Djokovic vs. H. Hurkacz; E. Rybakina vs. L. Samsonova; J. Cristian vs. M. Joint.

programme.title: Tennis Channel Live
programme.desc: Tennis stories of the day, detailed analysis and more.

programme.title: Courtside
programme.desc: Tennis highlights from recent matches.

programme.title: Tennis Channel Live
programme.desc: Tennis stories of the day, detailed analysis and more.

programme.title: Live: Get Up
programme.desc: ESPN's morning show features host Mike Greenberg with a rotating and diverse group of analysts opining about and analyzing the latest news from the world of sports. The two-hour, personality-driven show originates from Hudson Square in Lower Manhattan, a modern media hub for ESPN and The Walt Disney Company's New York-based teams. Greenberg, aka "Greeny," is formerly one-half of ESPN Radio's longt

programme.title: Live: First Take
programme.desc: Stephen A. Smith hosts this weekday morning sports debate show. Smith provides his expert takes on the day's trending sports topics and under-the-radar news. They're regularly joined by veteran analysts and the top guests in sports and entertainment.

programme.title: Live: The Pat McAfee Show
programme.desc: Former NFL punter Pat McAfee brings his humor and candor to the microphone to highlight the day's top stories.

programme.title: Live: SportsCenter
programme.desc: The latest news, highlights and inside information from every corner of the sports world is presented each day on "SportsCenter," ESPN's first-ever program when the network debuted in September of 1979. The flagship series airs an evening edition and a brand new midnight show each weekday before the stage is cleared for a live "SportsCenter" morning block that emphasizes fast-paced, highlights-dri

programme.title: Live: NBA Today
programme.desc: In-depth, comprehensive daily coverage of all aspects of the NBA from expert analysts.

programme.title: NFL Live
programme.desc: Host Laura Rutledge takes the helm of this weekday show featuring the likes of Marcus Spears, Dan Orlovsky, Mina Kimes, and Adam Schefter. The "NFL Live" crew entertains fans while offering all the latest news and analysis from across the NFL.

programme.title: Live: SportsCenter
programme.desc: The latest news, highlights and inside information from every corner of the sports world is presented each day on "SportsCenter," ESPN's first-ever program when the network debuted in September of 1979. The flagship series airs an evening edition and a brand new midnight show each weekday before the stage is cleared for a live "SportsCenter" morning block that emphasizes fast-paced, highlights-dri

programme.title: Live: Pardon the Interruption
programme.desc: The debate is the story in this fast-paced, half-hour series hosted by former Washington Post sportswriters Tony Kornheiser and Michael Wilbon. The pair engage in high-energy discussions, conduct interviews and often argue over topics not even related to sports. Other sports reporters appear as guests and offer opinions on the top stories of the day.

programme.title: Live: SportsCenter
programme.desc: The latest news, highlights and inside information from every corner of the sports world is presented each day on "SportsCenter," ESPN's first-ever program when the network debuted in September of 1979. The flagship series airs an evening edition and a brand new midnight show each weekday before the stage is cleared for a live "SportsCenter" morning block that emphasizes fast-paced, highlights-dri

programme.title: The Point
programme.desc: Featuring highlights, news, analysis, speed, skill and access to the stars, stories and personalities of the game; hosted by John Buccigross.

programme.title: Live: NHL Hockey
programme.desc: Western Conference Final Game 2.

programme.title: Live: SportsCenter
programme.desc: The latest news, highlights and inside information from every corner of the sports world is presented each day on "SportsCenter," ESPN's first-ever program when the network debuted in September of 1979. The flagship series airs an evening edition and a brand new midnight show each weekday before the stage is cleared for a live "SportsCenter" morning block that emphasizes fast-paced, highlights-dri

programme.title: Live: College Softball
programme.desc: Super Regional, Game 2.

programme.title: Live: Unsportsmanlike with Evan, Canty and Michelle
programme.desc: Start the day off right with Chris Canty, Evan Cohen and Michelle Smallmon providing an energizing and informative way to take on the day. Sports, life and laughter are what it's all about.

programme.title: 30 for 30
programme.desc: On March 13, 2006, the Duke University lacrosse team threw a party that not only changed lives and ruined careers, it jeopardized the future of the sport at the school and tarnished the university's reputation.

programme.title: Live: College Softball
programme.desc: From Bogle Park in Fayetteville, Ark.

programme.title: SEC Storied
programme.desc: At the 1983 College World Series, the championship culminated in a matchup between Roger Clemens' Texas Longhorns and the upstart Alabama Crimson Tide; a team of overachievers that included the best hitter in college baseball, Dave Magadan.

programme.title: Live: Women's College Lacrosse
programme.desc: First Semifinal.

programme.desc: Updates from the ongoing NCAA Women's Lacrosse Tournament.

programme.title: Live: Women's College Lacrosse
programme.desc: Second Semifinal.

programme.title: 30 for 30
programme.desc: Director Rory Karpf, through interviews with former players and rivals as well as Laettner himself, explores why this former Duke star was, and still is, so disliked.

programme.title: Live: College Softball
programme.desc: Super Regional, Game 1.

programme.title: SEC Storied
programme.desc: The 2012 Alabama softball team captures the SEC's first national title in the sport with a talented team powered by friendship, grit, and selflessness.

programme.title: SEC Inside
programme.desc: Each week, a half-hour episode will focus on a select team and explore previously unaired footage and sounds from game preparation, the sideline and following the final whistle.

programme.title: College Football
programme.desc: The No. 4 Crimson Tide bring a full head of steam into this match with the Gamecocks. Alabama has won six in a row, with the past four victories coming over ranked opponents after a 37-20 verdict against then-No. 11 Tennessee on Oct. 18.

programme.desc: Final.

programme.desc: From Scottsdale Stadium in Scottsdale, Ariz.

programme.title: Fair Territory with Ken Rosenthal
programme.desc: MLB insider Ken Rosenthal covers baseball's latest news and pressing issues.

programme.title: Live: MLB Baseball
programme.desc: The Toronto Blue Jays host the Pittsburgh Pirates in Game 1 of a three-game regular-season series. Starter Kevin Gausman pitches for Toronto against Bubba Chandler as Vladimir Guerrero Jr. leads the Blue Jays against Oneil Cruz at Rogers Centre.

programme.title: WVU Coaches Show
programme.desc: Highlights, analysis and interviews for WVU sports.

programme.desc: The Toronto Blue Jays host the Pittsburgh Pirates in Game 1 of a three-game regular-season series. Starter Kevin Gausman pitches for Toronto against Bubba Chandler as Vladimir Guerrero Jr. leads the Blue Jays against Oneil Cruz at Rogers Centre.

programme.title: MLB Baseball
programme.desc: The Toronto Blue Jays host the Pittsburgh Pirates in Game 1 of a three-game regular-season series. Starter Kevin Gausman pitches for Toronto against Bubba Chandler as Vladimir Guerrero Jr. leads the Blue Jays against Oneil Cruz at Rogers Centre.

programme.title: A Fishing Story With Ronnie Green
programme.desc: Veteran angler Ronnie Green shares his passion for fishing and celebrating the small things in life with entertaining guests who share their inspiring fish tales.

programme.desc: Back Pain? Hip? Sleep well thanks to this cooling topper!

programme.title: Natural Blood Pressure Management
programme.desc: Cardiologist Dr. Ernst von Schwarz, M.D. shows how to manage your blood pressure naturally and help protect your heart for life with My Best Heart.

programme.title: Pure Outdoor
programme.desc: Outdoor sports from all over the world, from freestyle ski jumping to airplane aerobatics.

programme.title: Offroad Odyssey
programme.desc: Adrenaline-pumping action, breathtaking scenery, and unforgettable encounter off-road.

programme.title: MLB Baseball
programme.desc: The Toronto Blue Jays host the Pittsburgh Pirates in Game 1 of a three-game regular-season series. Starter Kevin Gausman pitches for Toronto against Bubba Chandler as Vladimir Guerrero Jr. leads the Blue Jays against Oneil Cruz at Rogers Centre.

programme.title: Live: MLB Baseball
programme.desc: The Toronto Blue Jays host the Pittsburgh Pirates in Game 2 of a three-game series. Left-handed pitcher Patrick Corbin starts for Toronto against right-handed pitcher Paul Skenes as the interleague rivals clash again at Rogers Centre.

programme.title: Live: USL W League
programme.desc: Coverage of soccer action from the women's amateur league in the United States.

programme.title: Live DP World Tour Golf
programme.desc: The second round of the DP World Tour's Soudal Open, held at Rinkven International Golf Club in Antwerp. Norwegian golfer Kristoffer Reitan reigns as champion.

programme.title: Live Canadian F1 GP: Practice 1
programme.desc: The lights go green for the sole hour of practice during Canadian Grand Prix Sprint weekend. Mercedes man of the moment Kimi Antonelli comes from his third consecutive win of 2026.

programme.title: Live F2 Canada: Qualifying
programme.desc: The fastest driver here will claim pole position for Sunday's Feature Race, while the top 10 finishers are reversed to determine Saturday's Sprint grid.

programme.title: F1 Team Principals' Press Conf'
programme.desc: Formula 1 team bosses sit down to answer questions from the media ahead of the Canadian Grand Prix.

programme.title: Live Indy 500: Pit Stop Contest
programme.desc: In the run up to the Indy 500, the prestigious Pit Stop Challenge returns as pit crews test their speed and efficiency in a single-elimination competition at Indianapolis Motor Speedway.

programme.title: Live Canadian F1 GP: Sprint Quali'
programme.desc: The Canadian Grand Prix stages the third Sprint Qualifying session of 2026 as grid positions are set for Saturday's 5pm Sprint Race, where the fastest driver here will claim pole.

programme.title: Live F1 Academy: Qualifying
programme.desc: The F1 Academy field gets set for qualifying in Montreal. Each driver's fastest lap sets the grid for race two, while the order for race one is determined by reversing the top eight.

programme.title: Chasing The Dream
programme.desc: In this captivating series, step behind the scenes of Formula 2. Here, a look at the second race of the 2026 campaign in Miami, Florida.

programme.title: Sky Sports News
programme.desc: Round-up of the sports news with live analysis and comments, plus extended interviews with the headline makers.

programme.title: Live NBA Western Conference Finals
programme.desc: Game Three of the Western Conference finals during the NBA playoffs.

programme.title: Sky Sports News
programme.desc: Round-up of the sports news with live analysis and comments, plus extended interviews with the headline makers.

programme.title: Sky Sports Breakfast
programme.desc: Stay across the biggest sports stories this morning with a wrap-up of the headlines.

programme.title: Sky Sports News
programme.desc: Round-up of the sports news with live analysis and comments, plus extended interviews with the headline makers.

programme.title: Live WSL: Charlton v Leicester
programme.desc: The 2025-26 Barclays Women's Super League relegation play-off between the WSL 2's Charlton Athletic and top-flight Leicester City.

programme.title: Live EFL P/O Final: Hull v M'boro
programme.desc: The last remaining spot in next season's Premier League is decided at Wembley as Hull City and Middlesbrough contest one of football's richest games - the Championship play-off final.

programme.title: Live Ted's Sprint Notebook: Canada
programme.desc: Ted Kravitz is in the paddock as he reviews all the biggest stories from the third F1 Sprint of the 2026 season in Montreal.

programme.title: Live F2 Canada: Sprint
programme.desc: The third FIA F2 Sprint Race of the season gets underway in Montreal, Canada.

programme.title: Live Canadian F1 GP: Qualifying
programme.desc: The grid for Sunday's Canadian Grand Prix is set with Formula 1 qualifying at Circuit Gilles Villeneuve as the drivers look to battle their way through to Q3 for a shot at pole.

programme.title: Live F1 Academy: Race 2
programme.desc: Round two of the 2026 F1 Academy continues with a reverse-grid race at Circuit Gilles Villeneuve in Montreal.

programme.title: Live Ted's Quali Notebook: Canada
programme.desc: Ted Kravitz is live as he gathers reaction from inside the paddock and reviews all the biggest stories from qualifying at the Canadian Grand Prix.

programme.title: Sportsnet Central
programme.desc: Canada's premier destination for sports and analysis.

programme.title: Stanley Cup Playoffs Rewind
programme.desc: A look back at the key moments from the previous night's Stanley Cup playoff action.

programme.title: MLB Baseball
programme.desc: Toronto play the New York at Yankee Stadium to wrap up a four-game series. New York holds an edge in home runs this season. Vladimir Guerrero Jr. broke a power drought with a solo home run, sparking a 4-1 win over Detroit to win that series.

programme.title: Live: Blair & Barker
programme.desc: Jeff Blair and Kevin Barker talk all things Blue Jays, and Major League Baseball.

programme.title: Live: The FAN Pregame
programme.desc: Ailish Forfar and Justin Cuthbert discuss the stories that matter most to sports fans.

programme.title: NHL in 30
programme.desc: Replays of NHL contests in a shortened duration.

programme.title: Ready for a safer shower? Enjoy a one-day bath remodel with Jacuzzi.

programme.desc: High-stakes tournament poker from some of the world's famous casinos and card rooms.

programme.title: The Short List
programme.desc: The sports countdown, featuring iconic themes focused upon the memorable moments and individuals in sports; the 10 memorable debuts, the 10 revered innovators, the comebacks of all time and much more.

programme.title: Invincible
programme.desc: Periods of unrivaled domination in sport, including chapters from sport's greatest careers and iconic dynasties.

programme.title: The Iconic
programme.desc: Stories behind celebrated events, institutions, clubs, players, rivalries and moments in sport.

programme.title: Swing Clinic With Jimmy Hanlin
programme.desc: Golf tips, strategy and review of products.

programme.title: Golf Life
programme.desc: Golf tips, equipment reviews and golf course features.

programme.title: She's in the Game
programme.desc: Meet the next generation of superstar female athletes around the country as we go behind the scenes to shine the light on them and their interests off the field, along with catching up with the female legends who paved the way for all this growth.

programme.title: Sports Stars of Tomorrow
programme.desc: Profiles of the top rookie, college and high-school talent in sports; current athletes share their experiences, advice and personal impressions of the road to stardom.

programme.title: Offroad Odyssey
programme.desc: Adrenaline-pumping action, breathtaking scenery, and unforgettable encounter off-road.

programme.title: Pure Outdoor
programme.desc: Outdoor sports from all over the world, from freestyle ski jumping to airplane aerobatics.

programme.title: World Class Championship Boxing
programme.desc: Boxing action.

programme.title: World Championship Kickboxing
programme.desc: Highlights from some of the world's greatest kickboxing matches.

programme.title: Paid Programming
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Fairways of Life
programme.desc: New York Times's Best Seller and Golf Channel Host Matt Adams provides unforgettable interviews with golf's legends and stars, as well as lively interactive discussions about the game, travel and the latest in golf equipment.

programme.title: Golf Life
programme.desc: Featuring the latest trends, tours of the finest courses and tips from golf experts.

programme.title: Golfing the World
programme.desc: Highlighting golf courses and private resorts from around the world.

programme.title: Ready for a safer shower? Enjoy a one-day bath remodel with Jacuzzi.

programme.title: Live: FanDuel Racing

programme.title: Major League Fishing
programme.desc: Four teams compete in elimination match 2 to advance to the Knockout Rounds. From Shreveport-Bossier City, La.

programme.title: Made for the Outdoors
programme.desc: Each week on Made for the Outdoors, hosts Bill Sherck and Alexa Score throw open the factory doors and show how your favorite outdoor gear gets made.

programme.title: Predator Pursuit
programme.desc: Predator Pursuit TV, hosted by Jeff Thomason, is a rare blend of fast action predator hunting and educational material all rolled into one. Jeff will be taking viewers all over the world chasing a variety of dangerous predators. Prepare to be entertained, and informed, on different tactics to help you become a more successful hunter and put more fur in the back of your truck!

programme.title: Relentless Pursuit
programme.desc: Tim Wells hosts episode after episode featuring incredible shots on everything from hogs to frogs.

programme.title: Bloodline Hunting
programme.desc: Travel with Matt Bullins as he journeys through grassroots America, seeking out new adventures and uncovering the rich bloodlines that define our hunting culture. Along the way, he highlights the people, histories, and experiences that keep these timeless traditions thriving.

programme.title: Bill Dance Saltwater
programme.desc: Captain Mike Frenette guides Bill for big bull redfish!

programme.title: Fishing 411
programme.desc: Host and producer Mark Romanack shares his 30-plus years of professional fishing savvy with viewers.

programme.title: In Fisherman TV
programme.desc: Fine fishing draws a crowd, fueling good times fishing and booming economic impact, as the In-Fisherman staff highlights exceptional fisheries from across North America; goes big-boat salmon slayin' out of Winthrop Harbor on Lake Michigan.

programme.title: Small Town Hunting
programme.desc: Cody, Chris and Keith bring it back to the ground level by documenting the lifestyle of hunting in a raw, cinematic style.

programme.title: Grace Camo and Lace
programme.desc: Grace, Camo & Lace follows the Armstrong sisters on hunting adventures across North America. While in pursuit of big and small game, Alli and Adriana bring a fresh look and youthful energy to the hunting industry. The sisters have been hunting since they were five years old and share a passion for hunting and the outdoor lifestyle. The entire Armstrong family gets in on the action as they join All

programme.title: The Woodsman
programme.desc: The story of the Buckventures pro staff from all across the country; these are regular people with a real passion for hunting and the love of God's great outdoors.

programme.title: Steve's Outdoor Adventures
programme.desc: Travis Price drives up to Saskatchewan to hunt in our favorite spring black bear camp.

programme.title: Relentless Pursuit
programme.desc: Tim Wells hosts episode after episode featuring incredible shots on everything from hogs to frogs.

programme.title: Made for the Outdoors
programme.desc: Each week on Made for the Outdoors, hosts Bill Sherck and Alexa Score throw open the factory doors and show how your favorite outdoor gear gets made.

programme.title: Guns & Gear
programme.desc: The new Tactaload Flash 5 along with Smith & Wesson, Caldwell, Ruger and SureFire are new for 2025!

programme.title: The Hunt for Monster Bass
programme.desc: Champion angler Chris Lane chases down rumors of giant bass on Louisiana waters.

programme.title: Bill Dance Saltwater
programme.desc: Captain Mike Frenette guides Bill for big bull redfish!

programme.title: Everything Eichler
programme.desc: A closer look at the Eichler Field to Table lifestyle; a combination of the daily challenges of ranching, farming and running an outfitting business in Colorado.

programme.title: Whitetail Properties
programme.desc: Kentucky Buck Factory 2.0 management program continues.

programme.title: Bowhunter TV
programme.desc: Bowhunter contributor Danny Farris returns to the Prairie State to hunt with good friend Curt Price.

programme.title: Bloodline Hunting
programme.desc: Travel with Matt Bullins as he journeys through grassroots America, seeking out new adventures and uncovering the rich bloodlines that define our hunting culture. Along the way, he highlights the people, histories, and experiences that keep these timeless traditions thriving.

programme.title: MeatEater
programme.desc: Steve and Karl Malcolm explore the Gila Wilderness while hunting for wild turkeys.

programme.title: MeatEater
programme.desc: Steve and Greg Fonts spearfish for red snapper, cobia and triple tail off oil rigs in the Gulf Coast.

programme.title: Relentless Pursuit
programme.desc: Tim Wells hosts episode after episode featuring incredible shots on everything from hogs to frogs.

programme.title: Savage Outdoors
programme.desc: It's spring time in Texas and the axis are starting to roar at the ranches.

programme.title: Tecomate Whitetail Nation
programme.desc: When the red stag roar cranks up on Highveld, Mark grabs his Bergara and hits the hills!

programme.title: Stompin' groundz
programme.desc: Father and son trek to Texas for multiple whitetail deer.

programme.desc: In Louisiana, King joins his Farm to Fire friends, Matt and Toby, along with Hook'd Dat Fishing Charters and Southern Outdoor Bowfishing, captained by Chris Faler, for his first bowfishing adventure.

programme.desc: Adrenaline-pumping action, breathtaking scenery, and unforgettable encounter off-road.

programme.desc: Tommy goes aboard the Benthic Mariner and behind the scenes of the Atlantic Red Crab company with owner Jon Williams, a pillar of the American commercial fishing industry who has a few tricks up his sleeves when it comes to serving Atlantic red crab.

programme.title: Livin' the Dream With Captain Jimmy Nelson
programme.desc: Livin' the Dream follows Captain Jimmy Nelson and his wife Luiza as they travel and fish in exotic locales.

programme.title: Offroad Odyssey
programme.desc: Adrenaline-pumping action, breathtaking scenery, and unforgettable encounter off-road.

programme.title: This Is Africa
programme.desc: Andy Buchanan and his team embark on adrenaline-fueled hunting adventures across Africa, showcasing the continent's most sought-after trophies while delving into the crucial role of hunters in wildlife conservation. Amidst epic hunts and breathtaking scenery, they address misconceptions about hunting and highlight the collaborative efforts of local communities, governments, and hunters to protect

programme.title: Roger Raglin Outdoors
programme.desc: Roger returns to Rancho Cuevas in Mexico to hunt for trophy whitetail bucks.

programme.title: Winchester & Drury's Natural Born
programme.desc: The Drury Outdoors Team hunts game and offers tips.

programme.title: Ducks Unlimited
programme.desc: Doug Larsen joins his longtime friend and hunting partner Pat Pitt for a multi-generational adventure in the heart of the water-fowling mecca of Arkansas.

programme.title: Adrenaline
programme.desc: When conditions shift, mature bucks move; check out how cold fronts and late-season food sources create the storm for a kill.

programme.title: Catching Bass With Dustin Wilks
programme.desc: Accomplished angler Dustin Wilks fishes various bass fishing locations and teaches how to find and catch more fish. Loaded with fish catches, Catching Bass with Dustin Wilks is a show that is action packed and shows the viewer numerous techniques for catching bass. Dustin's straight forward approach coupled with his whimsical demeanor makes Catching Bass with Dustin Wilks the perfect teaching plat

programme.title: Hook the Future
programme.desc: Jovanni, Landon and Capt Don join Capt Chris Herrera for a redfish adventure in the tidal creeks of Palm Coast, Florida.

programme.title: Lindner's Angling Edge
programme.desc: Jeremy Smith and James Lindner head to a remote outpost to chase wilderness muskies on Lac Seul.

programme.title: Jimmy Houston Outdoors
programme.desc: Jimmy is winter time fishing in Oklahoma.

programme.desc: Doug Larsen joins his longtime friend and hunting partner Pat Pitt for a multi-generational adventure in the heart of the water-fowling mecca of Arkansas.

programme.title: Offroad Odyssey
programme.desc: Adrenaline-pumping action, breathtaking scenery, and unforgettable encounter off-road.

programme.title: Backwoods Life
programme.desc: Michael, Beth and Mike Lee are hunting in their home state of Georgia, filling tags and making memories.

programme.title: Ducks Unlimited
programme.desc: Doug Larsen joins his longtime friend and hunting partner Pat Pitt for a multi-generational adventure in the heart of the water-fowling mecca of Arkansas.

programme.title: Heartland Waterfowl
programme.desc: North Dakota delivers fast duck action to open the trip; when the plan falls apart mid-trip, the crew pivots-scouting in the morning, flushing pheasants in the afternoon and finishing strong over snow geese.

programme.title: Lindner's Angling Edge
programme.desc: Jeremy Smith and James Lindner head to a remote outpost to chase wilderness muskies on Lac Seul.

programme.title: Big Water Angler
programme.desc: Taking viewers on an adventurous journey across the Great Lakes region and beyond, exploring the best fishing destinations, techniques and insider tips from seasoned captains and guides.

programme.title: Bob Redfern's Outdoor Magazine
programme.desc: Hunting a species that most bird hunters don't think about, the woodcock.

programme.title: Bill Dance Saltwater

programme.title: Livin' the Dream With Captain Jimmy Nelson

programme.desc: The Crew is joined by Matt Kreifelf this week, as he celebrates his 50th birthday in The Bahamas with everyone.

programme.title: The Hunt for Monster Bass
programme.desc: Champion angler Chris Lane chases down rumors of giant bass on Louisiana waters.

programme.title: JT Kenney's Florida Bass
programme.desc: Join pro angler JT Kenney as he embarks on an epic journey across Florida, navigating its diverse waters in pursuit of monstrous bass, showcasing the thrill of the chase and the beauty of the Sunshine State's landscapes.

programme.title: Steve's Outdoor Adventures: Fishing with Wesley
programme.desc: Wesley White fishes for lake trout and northern pike in Saskatchewan.

programme.title: A Fishing Story With Ronnie Green
programme.desc: Tatiana Cruz shares how the Tampa Bay Kayak Anglers organization positively impacts the community and explains why she and her husband are deeply committed to supporting its mission and growth.

programme.title: Jimmy Houston Outdoors
programme.desc: Jimmy is winter time fishing in Oklahoma.

programme.title: The Fishmonger
programme.desc: Tommy goes aboard the Benthic Mariner and behind the scenes of the Atlantic Red Crab company with owner Jon Williams, a pillar of the American commercial fishing industry who has a few tricks up his sleeves when it comes to serving Atlantic red crab.

programme.title: American Heroes Outdoors
programme.desc: Fly-fishing in beautiful Montana with Veterans and Project Healing Waters.

programme.title: Stars and Stripes Adventures
programme.desc: Stars & Stripes Adventures & Purple Heart Homes through outdoor adventures, we aim to foster healing, camaraderie, and empowerment, while also engaging a network of patriots to make meaningful improvements to the homes of our heroes. It is the heart of everything we do, a deep commitment to those who've sacrificed for our country. Our Purpose, Vision, and Mission guides our efforts to ensure every

programme.title: Trekin Outdoors
programme.desc: Uncle Steve, Chris and Tyler of Trekin Outdoors take you into the real and raw realities of everyday hunting. Chasing big game across public and private lands. Showcasing the challenges that ordinary outdoorsmen face.

programme.title: Trekin Outdoors
programme.desc: Join veterans Chris Queen and Joey Woodke as they venture deep into the wild, sharing their authentic hunting experiences. Witness them tackle the great outdoors head-on, capturing the thrill of the hunt and revealing what real hunting is all about - raw, unfiltered, and full of adventure.

programme.title: Trekin Outdoors

programme.desc: A look back at the obscure, oddball, and twisted stories in New York Sports from 1987.

programme.title: Live: Mets Postgame
programme.desc: Analyst Gary Apple along with special guests review highlights from the previous New York Mets game, as well as giving extended commentary and in-depth insight to the team's overall performance.

programme.title: Live: SportsNite
programme.desc: SportsNite takes viewers inside all things New York sports by discussing the latest sports news of the night.

programme.title: Hope for Pain Sufferers
programme.desc: In this compelling investigation, John Walsh delves into OmegaXL and its natural origins; discover how this innovative supplement can provide relief from joint pain and improve your quality of life, all grounded in extensive research.

programme.title: MLB Baseball
programme.desc: From loanDepot Park in Miami.

programme.title: Doc 16
programme.desc: SNYs coverage of the Mets jersey retirement ceremony for Dwight "Doc" Gooden. The ceremony took place on April 14th, 2024 at Citi Field, celebrating his 11-year career with the Mets.

programme.title: Live: Mets Pregame
programme.desc: Analyst Gary Apple along with special guests preview the upcoming New York Mets game and series, as well as recapping past performances.

programme.title: Mets Hall of Fame: Class of 2026
The Fish Guyz
programme.desc: The Guyz join Capt. Chris Hanson in Key Largo to track down a tip to find some monster mangrove snappers; George and Lain battle the clock at Kingdom Escape Games and savor their fresh catch on the beach.

programme.title: Big Coast
programme.desc: Cruise into Rivers Inlet and Duncanby Lodge for prime-time big Chinook angling with Dave Logan.

programme.title: BigWater Adventures
programme.desc: Inshore fishing at Crocodile Bay, Costa Rica is a colorful endeavor with many beautiful species to catch.

programme.title: Two Conchs Adventures
programme.desc: The Crew is joined by Matt Kreifelf this week, as he celebrates his 50th birthday in The Bahamas with everyone.

programme.title: A Fishing Story With Ronnie Green
programme.desc: Tatiana Cruz shares how the Tampa Bay Kayak Anglers organization positively impacts the community and explains why she and her husband are deeply committed to supporting its mission and growth.

programme.title: Salt Water Sportsman National Seminar Series
programme.desc: George Poveromo leads a panel discussion on offshore trolling.

programme.title: The Seahunter
programme.desc: A trip down memory lane with Rob Fordyce and his favorite moments of The Sea Hunter TV.

programme.title: Modern Fishing With Jared Jeffries
programme.desc: The Blue Runner is one of the most successful charters when it comes to catching Big Eye Tuna off Point Pleasant, N.J.; it's no surprise that Jared has become good friends with first mate Steve; together they gather a knowledgeable crew.

programme.title: The Fish Guyz
programme.desc: The Guyz join Capt. Chris Hanson in Key Largo to track down a tip to find some monster mangrove snappers; George and Lain battle the clock at Kingdom Escape Games and savor their fresh catch on the beach.

programme.desc: Inshore fishing at Crocodile Bay, Costa Rica is a colorful endeavor with many beautiful species to catch.

programme.title: Modern Fishing With Jared Jeffries
programme.desc: The Blue Runner is one of the most successful charters when it comes to catching Big Eye Tuna off Point Pleasant, N.J.; it's no surprise that Jared has become good friends with first mate Steve; together they gather a knowledgeable crew.

programme.title: The Fish Guyz
programme.desc: The Guyz join Capt. Chris Hanson in Key Largo to track down a tip to find some monster mangrove snappers; George and Lain battle the clock at Kingdom Escape Games and savor their fresh catch on the beach.

programme.title: Big Coast
programme.desc: Cruise into Rivers Inlet and Duncanby Lodge for prime-time big Chinook angling with Dave Logan.

programme.title: Two Conchs Adventures
programme.desc: The Crew is joined by Matt Kreifelf this week, as he celebrates his 50th birthday in The Bahamas with everyone.

programme.title: Lisa Roper Outdoors
programme.desc: Welcome to Lisa Roper Outdoors, where every episode is a journey into the heart of outdoor adventure; from breathtaking landscapes to mouthwatering shore lunches, Lisa Roper brings you along as she connects with nature in a way that stirs the soul.

programme.title: The New Fly Fisher
programme.desc: Guests of the series will instruct viewers in something new and interesting about fly-fishing.

programme.title: Extreme Angler TV
programme.desc: Showcasing the incredible walleye and bass fishing opportunities across Northern Ontario, the lakes, lures and lodges.

programme.title: The Fish'n Canada Show
programme.desc: Our hosts feature Smallmouth and Walleye on Ontario's massive Lake Temiskaming.

programme.title: Westcoast Sporting Journal
programme.desc: Celebrating British Columbia's and Mexico's hottest outfitters and saltwater sportfishing destinations each week.

programme.title: BC Outdoors Sportfishing
programme.desc: Mike heads to Moutcha Bay to take part in the annual Angling for Autism event with John, Brandon, Mophead and Uncle Paulie.

programme.title: Fishing the Wild West
programme.desc: Wes looks back over 10 years of fishing in the province of Manitoba.

programme.title: Lisa Roper Outdoors
programme.desc: Welcome to Lisa Roper Outdoors, where every episode is a journey into the heart of outdoor adventure; from breathtaking landscapes to mouthwatering shore lunches, Lisa Roper brings you along as she connects with nature in a way that stirs the soul.

programme.title: The New Fly Fisher
programme.desc: Guests of the series will instruct viewers in something new and interesting about fly-fishing.

programme.title: Extreme Angler TV
programme.desc: Showcasing the incredible walleye and bass fishing opportunities across Northern Ontario, the lakes, lures and lodges.

programme.title: The Fish'n Canada Show
programme.desc: Our hosts feature Smallmouth and Walleye on Ontario's massive Lake Temiskaming.

programme.title: Westcoast Sporting Journal
programme.desc: Celebrating British Columbia's and Mexico's hottest outfitters and saltwater sportfishing destinations each week.

programme.title: BC Outdoors Sportfishing
programme.desc: Mike heads to Moutcha Bay to take part in the annual Angling for Autism event with John, Brandon, Mophead and Uncle Paulie.

programme.title: Fishing the Wild West
programme.desc: Wes looks back over 10 years of fishing in the province of Manitoba.

programme.title: Lisa Roper Outdoors
programme.desc: Welcome to Lisa Roper Outdoors, where every episode is a journey into the heart of outdoor adventure; from breathtaking landscapes to mouthwatering shore lunches, Lisa Roper brings you along as she connects with nature in a way that stirs the soul.

programme.title: The New Fly Fisher
programme.desc: Guests of the series will instruct viewers in something new and interesting about fly-fishing.

programme.title: Extreme Angler TV
programme.desc: Showcasing the incredible walleye and bass fishing opportunities across Northern Ontario, the lakes, lures and lodges.

programme.title: The Fish'n Canada Show
programme.desc: Our hosts feature Smallmouth and Walleye on Ontario's massive Lake Temiskaming.

programme.title: Westcoast Sporting Journal
programme.desc: Celebrating British Columbia's and Mexico's hottest outfitters and saltwater sportfishing destinations each week.

programme.title: BC Outdoors Sportfishing
programme.desc: Mike heads to Moutcha Bay to take part in the annual Angling for Autism event with John, Brandon, Mophead and Uncle Paulie.

programme.title: Fishing the Wild West
programme.desc: Wes looks back over 10 years of fishing in the province of Manitoba.

programme.title: In Fisherman TV
programme.desc: Fine fishing draws a crowd, fueling good times fishing and booming economic impact, as the In-Fisherman staff highlights exceptional fisheries from across North America; goes big-boat salmon slayin' out of Winthrop Harbor on Lake Michigan.

programme.title: The Next Bite
programme.desc: Jason Przekurat and Jake Caughey use a variety of baits and live bait to target great walleyes on Gull Lake in northern MN.

programme.title: Legends of Rod & Reel
programme.desc: The story of a local boy who grows up to be a Bass Master Champion.

programme.title: Larry Smith Outdoors
programme.desc: Larry Smith, Chad Bleeker, and Jeremy Stoner hunt tuna and mahi in Florida, sharing expert bait and fishing tips.

programme.title: Jokers Wild off the Hook
programme.desc: Sparky Sparkes and his family travel to fish and have adventures in the U.S. and abroad.

programme.title: Lindner's Angling Edge
programme.desc: Jeremy Smith and James Lindner head to a remote outpost to chase wilderness muskies on Lac Seul.

programme.title: Jon Thelen's Destination Fish
programme.desc: Professional angler Jon Thelen takes you on fishing adventures revealing simple techniques to catch more fish across the Midwest and Canada.

programme.title: Bass Pro Shops Fisherman's Handbook
programme.desc: Bass move shallow during the spring; when they do so, they feed up on baitfish and shad. A bait that is very effective in these scenarios is a soft plastic jerkbait; host Wade Middleton breaks down all things soft plastic jerkbait fishing during the spring.

programme.title: Fishing University
programme.desc: Having your own bass fishing sanctuary is amazing, and the team from American Sportfish teaches us how to manage it!

programme.title: Ultimate Catch
programme.desc: Epic father and son day out fishing at Bienville Outdoors.

programme.title: Texas Team Trail
programme.desc: Provides competitive team tournaments designed for working men and women across the state of Texas.

programme.title: Power-Pole National Redfish Tour
programme.desc: The 2025 Power-Pole National Redfish Tour; top 50 National Championship held at Sweetwater Marina in Delaccroix, La.

programme.title: Jimmy Houston Outdoors
programme.desc: Jimmy is winter time fishing in Oklahoma.

programme.title: Fishing With Roland Martin
programme.desc: Roland and Scott Martin night fish for snappers along the edge of the Alligator Light Reef using live pilchards and cut bait they caught earlier that afternoon. In the second segment, they target night tarpon around the Islamorada bridges with live pilchards and artificial lures.

programme.title: Bill Dance Outdoors
programme.desc: In part 2, Bill continues to Go Big or Go Home, using a larger, slower moving bait to catch bigger bass.

programme.title: Bill Dance Saltwater
programme.desc: Captain Mike Frenette guides Bill for big bull redfish!

programme.title: The Fish Guyz
programme.desc: The Guyz join Capt. Chris Hanson in Key Largo to track down a tip to find some monster mangrove snappers; George and Lain battle the clock at Kingdom Escape Games and savor their fresh catch on the beach.

programme.title: Big Coast
programme.desc: Cruise into Rivers Inlet and Duncanby Lodge for prime-time big Chinook angling with Dave Logan.

programme.title: The Seahunter

programme.title: Modern Fishing With Jared Jeffries
programme.desc: The Blue Runner is one of the most successful charters when it comes to catching Big Eye Tuna off Point Pleasant, N.J.; it's no surprise that Jared has become good friends with first mate Steve; together they gather a knowledgeable crew.

programme.title: MLF Team Series
programme.desc: Four teams compete in Florida for Elimination Match 1 of the Summit Cup to advance to the Knockout Rounds.

programme.title: The Hunt for Monster Bass
programme.desc: Champion anglers DeFoe and Lane compete to catch the largest bass.

programme.title: Mark Your Card
programme.desc: A preview of the day's racing with live news from the courses.
